title: Vintage Animations
body:
[![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Vintage_Animations/MP_VintageAnimations_header.webp)](https://pixeldreamstudios.net)

[![BisectHosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Vintage_Animations/MP_VintageAnimations_promo.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/PixelDream)

![Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Vintage_Animations/MP_VintageAnimations_description.webp)

**Vintage Animations** overhauls animations for basic actions such as chopping, digging, picking, and tilling. This mod is perfect for adding to the **immersion** and **role-playing mechanics** of the game. The animations were inspired by the animations of the game Vintage Story.

![Compatibility](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Vintage_Animations/MP_VintageAnimations_compatibility.webp)

If a mod is not marked as compatible, there is still a chance it could work. If it doesn't, please report it and I'll try to add compatibility for it.

- Better Combat ✅
- First Person Model ✅
- Real Camera ✅
- Epic Fight ❌

![Showcase](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Vintage_Animations/MP_VintageAnimations_showcase.webp)
